label: baseline
notes: avg of 3 runs (8.65, 8.38, 8.56). Per-test setup: ~0.28-0.32s each due to init_db+migrate_db on fresh tmp_path DB

label: session_db_savepoint_shared_model
notes: avg of 3 runs (0.71, 0.73, 0.80). Session-scoped DB init (init once vs 24x). Savepoint rollback for isolation. Session-scoped model_bundle (build GBR once vs 3x). 11x speedup. Remaining cost: 0.29s one-time pymatgen import+init_db, ~0.40s test execution.

label: xdist_parallel
notes: pytest -n auto: worker spawn overhead dominates for this fast suite. Discarded.
